definition:
1. to weave , ἱστὸν ὑφαίνειν to weave  a web, (Homer); ἱμάτιον (Plato Philosophus), etc.:—;absolute to weave, ply the loom , (Herdotus Historicus):—;Mid., ἱμάτιον ὑφαίνεσθαι to weave oneself  a cloak, (Plato Philosophus) 
2. to contrive, plan, invent , Lat. texere, δόλον ὑφαίνειν (Iliad by Homer); μῆτιν ὑφ. (Odyssey by Homer) 
3. generally, to create, construct , (Pindar) (ML)
